description: Optimised for natural conversation, opinion exchange, and exploratory dialogue. Minimises token usage and latency.

thinking.rationale: Discussion tasks are conversational. Thinking adds 10-30s TTFT with no quality gain for this task class.

memory_strategy.rationale: User preferences and prior context personalise discussion meaningfully.

knowledge_strategy.rationale: Discussion topics rarely require domain documentation retrieval.

tool_strategy.rationale: Minimise tool calls. Only Brain Memory is likely relevant for discussion personalisation.

rpm_optimization.rationale: Discussion sessions generate frequent short turns. Cap at 4 RPM to preserve quota for heavier tasks.
